title: Present customer latest pricing version instead of their current when changing plans
excerpt:
Today, customers are orphaned on the pricing version that they signed up on. There is no way for them to see or change to the latest plans that may offer better value or enable new features.

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml:
Today, customers are orphaned on the pricing version that they signed up on. There is no way for them to see or change to the latest plans that may offer better value or enable new features.

Change the marketplace to always show the latest pricing version when a customer changes/upgrades their plan so they can take advantage of the latest.

(I am not interested in workarounds involving cancelling, waiting for the subscription to end, uninstalling, and then reinstalling and buying again. That is not an acceptable solution or way to treat our mutual customers.)

I’m also shocked that I cannot find any request for this already…
